visual_description: Three men stand in a dimly lit room with a metal barred window behind them; the central man wears a grey suit while the man on the right, whose arm is bandaged, stands beside him and the man in black behind left. The camera shifts focus as the man on the right looks down and then the scene cuts to a close‑up of a hand wiping a table with a white cloth, revealing cigarettes and an ashtray.
audio_description: The audio is silent, with no clear speech or sound.
